title: lasianthus atroneurus
intro: Lasianthus atroneurus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to tropical Asia, and is also known as the mountain hawthorn. The medicinal properties of Lasianthus atroneurus lie in its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. Lasianthus atroneurus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
